backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the shop's data types (InventoryItem, Transaction, ShopSettings, etc.) and CRUD endpoints for inventory management, shop settings, transactions, customers, and reporting.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts old actor state (separate persistentProducts/persistentServices maps with legacy types) into the new unified persistentInventory map with updated ProductType and TransactionItem types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four implemented features (inventory rename, selling/purchase price fields, goods/service type selector, profit/loss calculation) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and brand color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the 'Kasir Bengkel' app that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (cashier, inventory, transactions, reports, settings) wrapped in a dark ThemeProvider and shared Sidebar layout.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component using forwardRef that renders shop logo, info, transaction details, itemized list with prices, total, and a thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the app's sidebar navigation with links to Kasir, Inventory, Riwayat, Laporan, and Pengaturan pages, highlighting the active route and showing a branded header and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including shop settings, inventory items, and transactions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (colors, sidebar, brand), imports Inter and Roboto Condensed fonts, and includes print styles for 80mm receipt output.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging (cn), Indonesian Rupiah formatting, timestamp formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: POS cashier page allowing users to search inventory, manage a shopping cart with quantity controls, apply discounts, enter customer and vehicle info, process checkout, and print receipts.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with add/edit/delete dialogs for items, supporting both goods (with quantity tracking) and services (unlimited quantity), displaying name, prices, stock, and type in a searchable table.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, using date pickers to filter data fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing the user to update store name, address, phone, thank-you message, and upload a logo that appears on printed receipts.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search and date-range filtering, supporting view details, print receipt, and delete actions on past transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, fonts, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the workshop POS app's architecture, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests such as renaming Katalog to Inventory and adding price/type fields.
